name: Sparse Inter-Layer Dependencies of Transformer FFN Neurons

description: arXiv:2607.11990v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Feedforward network (FFN) blocks account for a large fraction of the parameters and computation in Transformer architectures, yet their internal structure remains difficult to interpret due to the additive superposition induced by the residual stream. We examine whether the activation of an FFN neuron can be explained by a sparse set of precedin...
author: Johannes Knittel, Hanspeter Pfister
